productDisplayName: Giordano Women Chronograph White Dial Watch
description: Timewear from giordano has an elegant contemporary look and advanced Japanese movements, seamlessly blended with classic, timeless designs. A piece designed for modern life but remaining true to its heritage. Case diameter: 32 mm Case thickness: 11 mm Dial shape: Round Warranty: 1 Year Gold plated case with crystal encrusted bezel for durability, style and comfort Genuine leather strap with a tang clasp White mother of pearls dial with analogue display and chronograph dials Screw to reset time and alarm Solid case back for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 100 meters -wearable around sinks, during swimming, poolside diving but not highboard diving and surfing.Warranty provided by Brand Owner / Manufacturer
